titlestmt.titleproper: Cornell University Department of Plant Breeding records21-28-889
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-06-11 18:07:58 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University Department of Plant Breeding records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Department of Plant Breeding

did.physdesc: Correspondence, Photographs, Printed Materials, Reports, Research Materials
did.abstract: Departmental files include correspondence with officials at the N.Y.S. College of Agriculture and U.S. Department of Agriculture

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Departmental files include correspondence with officials at the N.Y.S. College of Agriculture and U.S. Department of Agriculture, agronomists at universities and experiment stations, county agents, farmers, seed growers, and others concerning departmental administration, plant breeding work done by farmers in cooperation with the department, seed certification and exhibit, extension work, advice to growers, and other matters concerning seed research and testing; reports and data relating to department and other research; and correspondence and reports concerning agricultural assistance work undertaken by the department in the Philippines and consideration of similar work in Thailand and Taiwan. Included is the incoming and outgoing correspondence of Liberty Hyde Bailey, Frank P. Bussell, Rollins A. Emerson, Carl E. Ladd, Robert D. Lewis, Harry H. Love, Albert R. Mann, Clyde H. Myers, William I. Myers, and Roy G. Wiggans.
Also, glass negatives, 1906-ca. 1930, of timothy, corn, and potato field plots. Includes papers of Sanford S. Atwood.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University Department of Plant Breeding records, #21-28-889. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Boxes 56-65 are restricted to Plant Breeding and Genetics Section Chair or their designate.

controlaccess.subject: Agriculture -- Philippines.
Agricultural extension work.
Seeds -- Certification.
Plant breeding.
controlaccess.corpname: New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences

unittitle.extref: Link to the finding aid. PDF file.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Not all the material in the collection is covered by this guide.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 2 folders; transferred from 21/28/1467; dead number as of 7-84

did.unittitle: Glass negatives (including corn, potato, timothy, field plots)
Glass negatives (including corn, potato, timothy, field plots)
Agronomy-Plant Breeding: Memorandum of Understanding (Lyon and Emerson)
Series VI. Synapsis and Faculty Pictures
Golden Age of Corn Genetics: 75th Anniversary

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Conference organized by William B. Provine, Professor of Evolutionary Biology and History of Science, and by the Plant Breeding faculty and Synapsis

did.unittitle: Plant Breeding II Symposium, Iowa State University: Autograph album

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains signatures of Synapsis members, per spontaneous meeting at the symposium; symposium hosted by Sayed Galal Sayed, Cairo, Egypt (Cornell Plant Breeding Ph.D., 1955)

did.unittitle: Photographs: Dr. and Mrs. Harry H. Love, Germany and Europe

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: the Loves returned early, because of the War

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Taken at time of International Plant Science Congress 1926 and/or International Genetics Congress 1932; both at Cornell

scopecontent.p: [some photos not in this box were hand-carried to RMC; to be integrated with the Harry H. Love papers (# 21-28-890]
